task_description: Polish UI/UX and wire real data for 5 apps: quantcalendar, quantdocs, quantdrive, quantmeet, quantads. Each app gets brand integration (@quant/brand), real API wiring via React Query, spring Framer Motion animations, loading/empty/error/success states, responsive 360-1440px, 44px tap targets, 60fps performance, dark mode, and accessibility.
